classification.loc_class: QC - Physics: waves, acoustics, and fluid dynamics

theory.canonical_statement: ID3829 records HBar Adag HBar MEff Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation.
theory.technical_interpretation: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `D:\00_Engine\CSV\refactored_derivations.tex` for registry alignment and later derivation.

latex_blocks: \[HBar] omega0 adag a + (\[HBar]^2/(2 mEff)) D[d, {1,2}] + V + gTunnel (adag + a)(D[d] + D[d]^\dagger) ]; (* Instanton action functional *) Sinstanton[d_] := FunctionalIntegral[ Integrand[1/2 mEff (Derivative[1][d][\[Tau]])^2 - V[d[\[Tau]]], {\[Tau], -\[Infinity], \[Infinity]}], BoundaryConditions -> {d[-\[Infinity]] == dInitial, d[\[Infinity]] == dFinal, Minimize[S]} ]; Atunnel = Sum[A[n] Exp[-n S0/\[HBar]], {n, 1, Infinity}]; \end{implementation} \subsection{Wavefunction Ansatz} \begin{definition}[Wavefunction Ansatz] In an occupation–number representation the total wavefunction is \[ \Psi_{\text{total}}(\{n_{\text{flux}},n_L,n_R\},t) = \psi_{\text{gyro}}(g,\omega)\,\psi_{\text{magnetic}}( ...
canonical_equation.source_section_latex: \[HBar] omega0 adag a + (\[HBar]^2/(2 mEff)) D[d, {1,2}] + V + gTunnel (adag + a)(D[d] + D[d]^\dagger) ]; (* Instanton action functional *) Sinstanton[d_] := FunctionalIntegral[ Integrand[1/2 mEff (Derivative[1][d][\[Tau]])^2 - V[d[\[Tau]]], {\[Tau], -\[Infinity], \[Infinity]}], BoundaryConditions -> {d[-\[Infinity]] == dInitial, d[\[Infinity]] == dFinal, Minimize[S]} ]; Atunnel = Sum[A[n] Exp[-n S0/\[HBar]], {n, 1, Infinity}]; \end{implementation} \subsection{Wavefunction Ansatz} \begin{definition}[Wavefunction Ansatz] In an occupation–number representation the total wavefunction is \[ \Psi_{\text{total}}(\{n_{\text{flux}},n_L,n_R\},t) = \psi_{\text{gyro}}(g,\omega)\,\psi_{\text{magnetic}}( ...

blocks.wolfram_input: HoldForm[TZPIDWolframRepresentation["ID3829", 1, <|"kind" -> "symbolic_token_index", "title" -> "HBar Adag HBar MEff Relation", "latex" -> "\\[HBar] omega0 adag a + (\\[HBar]^2/(2 mEff)) D[d, {1,2}] + V + gTunnel (adag + a)(D[d] + D[d]^\\dagger) ]; (* Instanton action functional *) Sinstanton[d_] := FunctionalIntegral[ Integrand[1/2 mEff (Derivative[1][d][\\[Tau]])^2 - V[d[\\[Tau]]], {\\[Tau], -\\[Infinity], \\[Infinity]}], BoundaryConditions -> {d[-\\[Infinity]] == dInitial, d[\\[Infinity]] == dFinal, Minimize[S]} ]; Atunnel = Sum[A[n] Exp[-n S0/\\[HBar]], {n, 1, Infinity}]; \\end{implementation} \\subsection{Wavefunction Ansatz} \\begin{definition}[Wavefunction Ansatz] In an occupation–number representation the total wavefunction is \\[ \\Psi_{\\text{total}}(\\{n_{\\text{flux}},n_L,n_R\\},t) = \\psi_{\\text{gyro}}(g,\\omega)\\,\\psi_{\\text{magnetic}}( ...", "numericAtoms" -> {2, 1}, "symbolicTokens" -> {"dagger", "subsection", "Psi", "psi", "omega", "HBar", "omega0", "adag", "a", "mEff", "D", "d", "V", "gTunnel", "Instanton", "action", "functional", "Sinstanton", "FunctionalIntegral", "Integrand", "Derivative", "Tau", "Infinity", "BoundaryConditions", "dInitial", "dFinal", "Minimize", "S", "Atunnel", "Sum", "A", "n", "Exp", "S0", "Wavefunction", "Ansatz", "In", "an", "occupation", "number", "representation", "total", "wavefunction", "is", "L", "R", "t", "g"}, "candidateWolframInput" -> "", "candidateMethod" -> "contains_text_or_markup"|>]]

summary.candidate_policy: best_effort_candidates_parse_checked; unparseable candidates downgraded to symbolic token representation
